data.title: Faraday Future Strategically Launches Its Embodied AI Developer Platform Purpose-Built for AI Natives, Marking 2026 as the Inaugural Year of EAI Robotics Education
data.description: In San Francisco, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) held the EAI Developer Ecosystem Forum and unveiled the FF EAI Brain & Open Developer Platform on April 25. The California-based global Embodied AI company introduced the platform tailored for AI natives, signaling 2026 as the start of EAI advancements.

data.title: IBRX SHAREHOLDER UPDATE: ImmunityBio (IBRX) Sued After FDA Flags Misleading Cancer Claims, Shares Plunge 21%, $2B Market Cap Lost -- Hagens Berman
data.description: In San Francisco on April 27, 2026, ImmunityBio, Inc. (NASDAQ: IBRX) is currently dealing with a securities class action lawsuit. This lawsuit aims to represent investors who bought or acquired ImmunityBio securities within the period of January 19, 2026, to March 24, 2026.
